description:
## Problem
The atomic write pattern (write to .tmp file → rename to final path) appears in two places:
1. `handle_save_favicon` (lines 217-224) — with error handling, temp cleanup, logging
2. `do_fetch_google_favicon` (lines 350-354) — without error handling, no temp cleanup

## Fix
Extract a `write_atomically(filepath : String, data : Bytes) : Bool` helper that:
- Writes to `filepath + ".tmp"`
- Renames to final path
- Cleans up .tmp on error
- Returns true on success, false on failure
- Logs errors

## File
`src/favicon_storage.cr`
title: DRY: extract atomic file write helper
